texto: This is what Helen has learned: it is possible to be so tired you cannot reach for the sky, you cannot breathe. You can’t even talk. You can’t pick up the phone. You can’t do a dish or dance or cook or do up your own zipper.
explicacao: Citação de Lisa Moore sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “This is what Helen has learned: it is possible to be so tired you cannot reach for the sky, you c…” articula reflexao, depression, cannot em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
